description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker, predominantly blue with white accents and a white 'N' logo on the side, characteristic of New Balance shoes. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and mesh, providing both durability and breathability. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces and a padded tongue displaying branding details. The midsole is light gray with a greenish accent at the heel, designed for cushioning and support, while the outsole is made of textured rubber for traction. The heel area is reinforced and displays the 'new balance' text in white. The overall design is sporty and functional, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A blue and white New Balance athletic sneaker with a criss-cross lacing system, padded tongue, and textured rubber sole. The shoe features prominent branding and a supportive, cushioned midsole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white laces in a criss-cross pattern, and the padded tongue with branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large white 'N' logo, blue upper, and the layered midsole with greenish heel accent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced heel, 'new balance' text in white, and the layered midsole structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the 'N' logo, blue and white color scheme, and treaded outsole.
attribute_logo: White 'N' on both sides, 'new balance' text on heel, red/blue/white label on tongue
